info.name: Stables-HT-HOL-ONLY-time-daily-1-fix4
info.description:
HOL-ONLY fix4: RISK-FIRST DEPOSIT (Option A)
══════════════════════════════════════════════

KEY FIX from fix3: Check risk BEFORE depositing.
  fix3: Deposits $75K on Day 1 blindly → models drain it all immediately
  fix4: Checks risk first. If risky → stay in cash. Only deposit when safe.

HOLDER DECISION TREE (each epoch):
  1. Read today's risk metrics
  2. If SAFE and USDC < target and cash > min reserve:
     → DEPOSIT: move cfg_deposit_pct of available cash into USDC
     → Then run ACTUS to verify models don't immediately drain it
  3. If RISKY and USDC > 0:
     → REDEEM: run ACTUS models, PP payoffs mirror to cash
  4. Otherwise:
     → HOLD: wait for conditions to change

EXPECTED BEHAVIOR (this scenario):
  Days 1-21:  Risky (liq<25% or pegDev>1% or pegRisk>10 or reserves<$101K)
              → Holder stays in cash, no deposits
  Days 22-25: Transitional (not all metrics safe yet)
              → Hold
  Days 26+:   SAFE (all metrics within safe thresholds)
              → Holder deposits incrementally into USDC
              → ACTUS models confirm: PP=$0 (no drain when safe)
  Day 31:     Final: Cash~$78K + USDC~$72K = $150K preserved

CONFIGURABLE (edit in Collection Variables):
  cfg_initial_cash:       Starting cash (default: $150,000)
  cfg_target_usdc:        Target USDC allocation (default: $75,000)
  cfg_min_cash_reserve:   Never go below this cash (default: $30,000)
  cfg_stablecoin:         Label (default: USDC)
  cfg_deterioration_pct:  % deterioration trigger (default: 1%)
  cfg_deposit_pct:        % of available cash to deposit per day (default: 30%)
  cfg_peg_dev_trigger/safe: Peg deviation thresholds
  cfg_reserves_floor/safe:  Reserve thresholds
  cfg_liquidity_floor/safe: Liquidity thresholds
  cfg_peg_risk_trigger/safe: Peg risk score thresholds

ZERO CODE CHANGES. Same 4 Java model classes. Collection JSON only.
Run with Collection Runner. Open Console (Ctrl+Alt+C).

exec: // Key change from fix3: NEVER deposit into USDC when conditions are risky.
// Check risk FIRST, then decide: deposit (safe), redeem via ACTUS (risky), or hold.
var pad = function(n) { return n < 10 ? '0' + n : '' + n; };
console.log('HOL-ONLY fix4: RISK-FIRST DEPOSIT \u2014 CHECK BEFORE YOU BUY');
console.log('  Deposit chunk: ' + (CFG.depositPct * 100) + '% of available cash when safe');
console.log('  RULE: Never deposit when risky. Only deposit when ALL metrics safe.');
// Mirror PP: USDC drains, cash increases
day: dayNum, cash: Math.round(cash), usdc: Math.round(usdc), total: total,
pp: Math.round(ppPayoff), action: holderAction, amt: Math.round(holderAmt),
pegDev: m.pegDev, pegRisk: m.pegRisk, reserves: m.reserves,
liq: Math.round(liq * 1000) / 10, risky: isRisky, safe: isSafe
// After deposit, run ACTUS on the USDC position to check if models drain it
// RISKY: run ACTUS models to generate PP events (redeem USDC → cash)
// HOLD: nothing to do (either neutral risk, or no USDC to redeem, or no cash to deposit)
console.log('Day  Cash        ' + SC + '        Total       Action           Risk');
var maxCash = 0, minUsdc = 999999999, maxPP = 0, deposits = 0, redeems = 0, maxUsdc = 0;
var risk = s.risky ? '\u26A0\uFE0F RISKY' : (s.safe ? '\u2705 SAFE' : '\u2796 HOLD');
console.log(String(s.day).padStart(3) + '  ' + cashStr + usdcStr + totalStr + actStr + risk);
console.log('FINAL: Cash=$' + last.cash + ' ' + SC + '=$' + last.usdc + ' Total=$' + last.total);
console.log('  Portfolio preservation: ' + ((last.total / INIT) * 100).toFixed(1) + '% of initial $' + INIT);
console.log('  Max cash: $' + maxCash + ' | Max ' + SC + ': $' + maxUsdc);
console.log('  Peak daily PP redeem: $' + maxPP);
console.log('  Deposit days: ' + deposits + '/31 | Redeem days: ' + redeems + '/31');
